subject: Error during preprocessing
body:
Hello,

I'm getting an error during preprocessing which is resulting on all of the 
micrographs turning grey and becoming deselected.  The error reads:

Received "MovieProcessCTF", with 2 arguments, for GPU #0, 22941 MB free
System.OverflowException: Arithmetic operation resulted in an overflow.
   at Warp.Image.get_HostData() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Image.cs:line 95
   at Warp.Image..ctor(int3 dims, Boolean isft, Boolean iscomplex, Boolean 
ishalf) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Image.cs:line 243
   at Warp.Movie.ProcessCTF(Image originalStack, ProcessingOptionsMovieCTF 
options) in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\Movie.cs:line 1340
   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp2\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 171
Received "LoadStack", with 3 arguments, for GPU #0, 22900 MB free
Loaded stack: 5760, 4092, 80, normal, real, 1 A/px, ID = -1, 0.5
10.266

Does anyone know what could be causing this?

Thanks! 
Jacob Croft
University of Washington
